# HyperAgent Documentation Manifest for AI Systems
# This file guides AI crawlers to the most important documentation

# Project Overview
/docs/spec/HyperAgent Spec.txt - Complete project specification
/README.md - Project overview and quick start

# Architecture & Design
/docs/BRANCHING_STRATEGY.md - Git branching strategy
/docs/GITOPS_SETUP.md - GitOps configuration
/docs/BRANCH_PROTECTION_SETUP.md - Branch protection rules

# Development Guides
/docs/DEVELOP_BRANCH_REFACTOR_PLAN.md - Development branch refactoring plan
/docs/PROJECT9_ISSUES_ANALYSIS.md - GitHub Project 9 issues analysis

# Skills & Resources
/.cursor/skills/ - Modular AI capabilities
/.cursor/llm/ - LLM documentation resources
/.cursor/rules/ - Project rules and guidelines

# API Documentation
/docs/api/ - API documentation

# Frontend Documentation
/docs/frontend/ - Frontend development guides

# Security
/docs/security/ - Security guidelines
/SECURITY.md - Security policy

# Contributing
/CONTRIBUTING.md - Contribution guidelines
/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md - Code of conduct

# Full Documentation (if available)
